# tiny-tiny-tok-
A modern TikTok-style social media platform with reels, stories, real-time feeds, Firebase backend, and full PWA support.

## Features
- Reels Upload
- Stories
- Real-time Feed
- Firebase Authentication
- Firestore Database
- Firebase Storage
- PWA Support
- Android APK Build
- TikTok-style UI

## Version
1.0.0-final

## Package
com.tinytinytoktok.app
